channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: For Johnny and Matthew: Blue Jackets play their home opener with Gaudreaus in mind
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau’s Columbus teammates were given a few options for how to handle their emotions during the Blue Jackets’ home opener. If you want to cry, cry. If you want to laugh, laugh. The only rules — play the game the way “Johnny Hockey” would and with him in mind.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell says the league still reviewing latest claims against Deshaun Watson
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell said the league is still reviewing the latest claims of sexual assault and battery against Deshaun Watson.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oregon's Dan Lanning admits to exploiting loophole against Ohio State, reportedly sparking NCAA probe
item.description: Oregon head coach Dan Lanning admitted to putting an extra player on the field against Ohio State on purpose thanks to a loophole that the NCAA is reportedly looking into.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's AL Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL owners approve Jacksonville's $1.4 billion 'stadium of the future' set to open in 2028
item.description: NFL owners unanimously approved Jacksonville's $1.4 billion “stadium of the future” Tuesday, a decision that should keep the Jaguars in one of the league's smallest markets for at least another 30 years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 76ers' Paul George diagnosed with bone bruise but no structural damage after hyperextending knee
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers forward Paul George has a bone bruise but did not suffer any structural damage when he hyperextended his left knee during a preseason game, the team said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay receive homophobic threats after Game 1 of WNBA Finals
item.description: New York Liberty star Breanna Stewart and her wife Marta Xargay received threatening homophobic anonymous emails after Game 1 of the WNBA Finals.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Phillies enter the offseason confident that bulk of roster is good enough to win the World Series
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Rob Thomson will return next season, complete with a contract extension through 2026. His coaching staff will remain in tact for 2025, as well.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Sockers release 2024-2025 season tickets and schedule
item.description: Season tickets and the full season schedule for the San Diego Sockers' 2024-2025 season are now available for fans to purchase.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers-Mets NLCS Game 1 draws huge audience for FOX Sports
item.description: Game 1 of the National League Championship Series between the New York Mets and Los Angeles Dodgers drew big numbers for FOX Sports on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Steelers QB Russell Wilson 'in consideration' to start against the Jets in return from calf injury
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson's time may be fast approaching in Pittsburgh. Coach Mike Tomlin said Tuesday that Wilson is “in consideration” to be the starting quarterback when the Steelers (4-2) host the New York Jets (2-4) on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: That's flippin' amazing! Figure skating Grand Prix season begins with backflips no longer banned
item.description: American figure skater Ilia Malinin has been doing gymnastics off the ice much of his life, one of the many reasons why he can so effortlessly land the dazzling quadruple jumps that made him a world champion at just 19 years old last March.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The cost of rising number of injuries in European soccer nears $800 million, report finds
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — The rising number of injuries to top soccer players came at a cost of nearly $800 million to teams across Europe's leading leagues last season, according to a report published Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phillies sign manager Rob Thomson to 1-year extension after three straight trips to playoffs
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Philadelphia Phillies signed manager Rob Thomson to a one-year contract extension through the 2026 season after he led the team to three straight trips to the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump calls transgender inclusion in women's sports policies 'so far out'
item.description: Former President Donald Trump called the notion of having transgender inclusion in women's sports "so far out" during an interview released Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, sources say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) -- The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bill Belichick torches Jets ownership over decision to fire Robert Saleh after 5 games
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick torched the New York Jets for the decision to fire Robert Saleh five games into the 2024 seaosn.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The New York Mets weren't sure what they were going to get with the Los Angeles Dodgers sending out a parade of relievers in a bullpen game. They found out right away.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Mark Vientos' grand slam helps Mets even NLCS with Game 2 win over Dodgers
item.description: New York Mets rookie Mark Vientos continues to remain hot at the plate, as his grand slam in Los Angeles helped even the series with the Dodgers in a 7-3 win on the road.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce attend Yankees playoff game in New York
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce were spotted in New York City attending the New York Yankees-Cleveland Guardians playoff game on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers' Flaherty shares NLCS Game 1 'moment' with mother
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers' major trade-deadline acquisition from this summer is already worth it. Jack Flaherty was the star of the show in Game 1 of the NLCS between L.A. and the New York Mets, as he pitched an electric seven shutout innings while giving up just two hits in a 9-0 win.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at hurricane worries and one big win
item.description: Buccaneers Head Coach Todd Bowles stayed up most of the night last Wednesday into Thursday morning watching Hurricane Milton consume the Tampa Bay area with damaging high winds, torrential rain, and flood waters claiming spots that had barely begun recovery from Hurricane Helene less than two weeks
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Snag last-minute Yankees ALCS tickets for under $100
item.description: THE BRONX, N.Y. (PIX11) --- Yankees fans can snag some last-minute tickets to Monday night's playoff game for cheaper than a regular season game. The least expensive seats for Game 1 of the ALCS at Yankee Stadium were going for around $102 on StubHub, as of Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Mira Wassef, PIX 11

item.title: Mets' Kodai Senga struggles with control, knocked out in 2nd inning by Dodgers in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kodai Senga knew something was off just before he took the mound in the National League Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Royals keep playoff hopes alive with 3-0 win over Seattle
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the second to last home game of the season, the Utah Royals kept their playoff hopes alive for another week, beating the Seattle Reign 3-0 off of a Cloe Lacasse hat trick.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield passes for 4 TDs as the Bucs treat storm-weary fans to a 51-27 win over the Saints
item.description: Baker Mayfield overcame three turnovers with 325 yards and four touchdowns passing, and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers defeated the New Orleans Saints 51-27 in what they hoped would be a morale boost to their many fans who endured Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft died Saturday morning from a rare form of lung cancer, coach Mack Brown said. “This young man fought so hard for his two and a half years,” Brown said. “The doctors told us he outlived what he should’ve.
item.dc:creator: DOUG BONJOUR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart and the Liberty look to bounce back and even WNBA Finals series against the Lynx
item.description: The two-time MVP and her teammates will need to be at their best on Sunday when they face the Lynx in Game 2 of the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Rising returns, but Utes fall flat against ASU, 27-19
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising was back at quarterback, but the Utes offense continued to struggle to score touchdowns in a 27-19 loss at Arizona State Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
